title: Minestruct
description: Minestruct is a mod that adds variety of new blocks for building!
body:
--Minestruct is a mod that adds variety of new blocks for building! It currently adds:--

--New Bricks--
-Long Bricks-
-Big Bricks-
-Cobblestone Bricks-
-Glazed Bricks-
-Basalt Bricks-
-Onyx Bricks-
-Hardened Dirt Bricks-

--Dry Dirt--
--Hardened Dirt--
(Hardened Dirt only Generates in badlands Biomes.)

--Metallized Logs & Stems--

--Wallpapers--

--Chalk & Dyed Chalk--
(Default chalk generates on water-based biomes.)

--New Paintings--
-Sand-
-Alien-
-Foggy Man-
-Fisher-

--Rough Ore Blocks--

--Chalcedony Blocks--
-Chalcedony-
-Polished Chalcedony-
(Rarely replaces calcite on underwater biomes.
Can also be made from 4 calcites.
Generates onyx pieces if there is 2 blocks of water on top of it.)

--Onyx Pieces--
(Drops 1-5 onyx if broken with a pickaxe, also silk touchable.)

--Onyx Blocks--
-Onyx Block-
-Polished Onyx-

--Wooden Parquets--

--Smooth Blocks--
-Smooth Deepslate-
-Smooth Amethyst-

--Thatch--

--Glintine and Dusktufa--

--Thriver--
(Thriver is a mob that spawns in soul sand valley.
A Thriver spawns when a strider near a soul sand block dies.
Thriver drops Soul Lungs upon death, can be used to make soul fire anywhere you want.
Thrivers are immune to burning and wither.)

--Quilted Leather--

---Yarn--
--Yarn Carpet--
(Crafted with feather, you can jump higher on yarn blocks.)

--Tiki Torch--
